## OpenMnemo Monorepo - Complete Architecture Overview

### 1. Root Package Structure

**Location:** `/d/demo1/openmnemo/`

**Root package.json** (`/d/demo1/openmnemo/package.json`):
- Private workspace with pnpm@9.15.0
- Turbo-based monorepo (v2.4.0)
- Node.js >=20 required
- Scripts: `build`, `test`, `lint`, `typecheck` (all delegated to Turbo)

**pnpm-workspace.yaml:**
- Single glob: `packages/*` (all packages are direct children of packages/)

**turbo.json configuration:**
- `build` task: depends on `^build` (upstream), outputs to `dist/**`
- `test` task: depends on `build`
- `lint` task: no dependencies
- `typecheck` task: depends on `^build`

---

### 2. Package Structure

#### **@openmnemo/types** (`packages/types/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/index.js` | **Types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
**Build:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`

**Exported Types:**
- `type Client = 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini'`
- `interface TranscriptMessage { role: string; text: string; timestamp: string | null }`
- `interface TranscriptToolEvent { summary: string; timestamp: string | null }`
- `interface ParsedTranscript { client: Client; session_id: string; title: string; started_at: string; cwd: string; branch: string; messages: TranscriptMessage[]; tool_events: TranscriptToolEvent[]; source_path: string }`
- `interface ManifestEntry { client: string; project: string; session_id: string; raw_sha256: string; title: string; started_at: string; imported_at: string; cwd: string; branch: string; raw_source_path: string; raw_upload_permission: string; global_raw_path: string; global_clean_path: string; global_manifest_path: string; repo_raw_path: string; repo_clean_path: string; repo_manifest_path: string; message_count: number; tool_event_count: number; cleaning_mode: string; repo_mirror_enabled: boolean }`

---

#### **@openmnemo/core** (`packages/core/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/index.js` | **Types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
**Build:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
**Dependencies:** `@openmnemo/types`, `fast-glob@3.3.3`, `sql.js@1.12.0`

**Source Structure:**
- `src/transcript/` - Parsing, import, discovery, database
  - `common.ts` - Constants (CLIENTS, TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES, SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES, TOOL_USE_TYPES, TOOL_RESULT_TYPES), utilities (slugify, sha256File, contentHash, timestamp handling, text extraction, deduplication)
  - `parse.ts` - `inferClient()`, `parseTranscript()`, `parseCodexTranscript()`, `parseClaudeTranscript()`, `parseGeminiTranscript()`
  - `discover.ts` - File discovery with glob patterns per client
    - `defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()`, `defaultClientRoots()`, `discoverSourceFiles()`, `inferProjectSlug()`, `transcriptMatchesRepo()`, `projectSlugsMatch()`, `safeFileMtime()`
  - `import.ts` - Orchestration logic
    - `importTranscript()`, `transcriptHasContent()`, `writeCleanMarkdown()`, `preserveExistingImportTimestamp()`, `manifestSignature()`, `manifestChanged()`, `writeJson()`, `appendJsonl()`, `copyFile()`
  - `db.ts` - SQLite search index using sql.js
    - `upsertSearchIndex()`, `searchTranscripts()`
    - PK: client, project, session_id, raw_sha256
    - Data columns: title, started_at, imported_at, cwd, branch, raw_source_path, raw_upload_permission, global_raw_path, global_clean_path, repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path, message_count, tool_event_count

- `src/recall/` - Session recall and sync
  - `recall.ts` - `recall()`, `syncCurrentProject()`, `findLatestSession()`, `findLatestFromJsonl()`, `cwdMatches()`, `formatRecallText()`
  - Exports `RecallResult` interface

- `src/storage/` - Storage abstraction
  - `adapter.ts` - `StorageAdapter` interface (async): `writeFile()`, `readFile()`, `exists()`, `mkdir()`, `copyFile()`, `appendFile()`
  - `local-adapter.ts` - `LocalAdapter` implementation using Node.js fs
  - `gitea-adapter.ts` - `GiteaAdapter` with options

- `src/utils/`
  - `path.ts` - `toPosixPath()` - converts Windows paths to POSIX format
  - `exec.ts` - `execCommand()`, `git()` helper functions

---

#### **@openmnemo/sync** (`packages/sync/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/index.js` | **Types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
**Build:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
**Dependencies:** `@openmnemo/core`, `@openmnemo/types`, `smol-toml@1.3.1`

**Source Files:**
- `src/config.ts` - Config loading/saving
  - `interface ProjectEntry { readonly path: string; readonly name: string }`
  - `interface Config { readonly heartbeat_interval: string; readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]; readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]; readonly auto_push: boolean; readonly log_level: string }`
  - Functions: `loadConfig()`, `saveConfig()`, `memorytreeRoot()`, `configPath()`, `intervalToSeconds()`, `registerProject()`
  - Loads from `~/.memorytree/config.toml` with smol-toml parser

- `src/heartbeat.ts` - Background sync daemon
  - `main()`, `runHeartbeat()`, `processProject()`, `scanSensitive()`, `gitCommitAndPush()`, `tryPush()`

- `src/lock.ts` - Process locking
  - `lockPath()`, `acquireLock()`, `releaseLock()`, `readLockPid()`, `isProcessAlive()`

- `src/alert.ts` - Alert system
  - Constants: `MAX_ALERTS`, `ALERT_TYPES`, `FAILURE_THRESHOLD`
  - Functions: `alertsPath()`, `readAlerts()`, `writeAlert()`, `writeAlertWithThreshold()`, `resetFailureCount()`, `clearAlerts()`, `formatAlertsForDisplay()`
  - `type Alert` exported

- `src/log.ts` - Logging
  - `setupLogging()`, `getLogger()`, `_resetLogger()`
  - `type LogLevel`, `type Logger` exported

---

#### **@openmnemo/cli** (`packages/cli/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/main.js` (binary: `openmnemo`)
**Build:** `tsup` (uses tsup.config.ts)
**Dependencies:** `@openmnemo/core`, `@openmnemo/sync`, `@openmnemo/types`, `commander@13.1.0`

**CLI Commands** (from `src/main.ts`):

1. **`init`** - Initialize a MemoryTree workspace
   - Options: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--goal-summary`, `--locale`, `--date`, `--time`, `--force`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-init.ts` â†’ `cmdInit()`

2. **`upgrade`** - Upgrade repo to MemoryTree format
   - Options: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--goal-summary`, `--locale`, `--date`, `--time`, `--format` (text|json)
   - Handler: `src/cmd-upgrade.ts` â†’ `cmdUpgrade()`

3. **`import`** - Import one transcript file
   - Options: `--source` (required), `--root`, `--client` (auto|codex|claude|gemini), `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--raw-upload-permission` (not-set|approved|denied), `--format` (text|json)
   - Handler: `src/cmd-import.ts` â†’ `cmdImport()`

4. **`discover`** - Discover and import local AI transcripts
   - Options: `--root`, `--client` (all|codex|claude|gemini), `--scope` (current-project|all-projects), `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--raw-upload-permission`, `--limit`, `--format`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-discover.ts` â†’ `cmdDiscover()`

5. **`locale`** - Detect effective locale
   - Options: `--root`, `--locale`, `--format`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-locale.ts` â†’ `cmdLocale()`

6. **`recall`** - On-demand sync and latest session recall
   - Options: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--activation-time`, `--format`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-recall.ts` â†’ `cmdRecall()`

7. **`daemon`** - Heartbeat lifecycle management
   - Subcommands:
     - `install` - Register with OS scheduler (options: `--interval`, `--auto-push`)
     - `uninstall` - Remove scheduled task
     - `run-once` - Execute single heartbeat cycle
     - `watch` - Continuous loop (dev mode, option: `--interval`)
     - `status` - Show heartbeat and lock state
   - Handler: `src/cmd-daemon.ts`

**Project utilities** (`src/project/`):
- `scaffold.ts` - `buildDatetime()`, `createMemoryDirs()`, `findExternalPolicySources()`, `resolveScaffoldPaths()`, `resolveTemplateDir()`, `scaffoldContentFiles()`, `writeTemplate()`
- `locale.ts` - Locale detection
- `upgrade.ts` - Upgrade logic

---

### 3. TypeScript Configuration

**All packages use consistent tsconfig.json:**
- **Target:** ES2022
- **Module:** NodeNext (ESM with `.js` extensions required)
- **Root directory:** `src/`
- **Output directory:** `dist/`
- **Strict mode:** true
- **Source maps:** true
- **ESM interop:** true
- **Skip lib check:** true

**Notable difference (cli vs core/sync/types):**
- `packages/cli/tsconfig.json` has `"declaration": false` (CLI, no types exported)
- `packages/core`, `packages/sync`, `packages/types` have `"declaration": true`

---

### 4. Build System

**Root build script:** `turbo build`
- Depends on topological order

**Per-package build scripts:**
- **types & core:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
- **sync:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
- **cli:** `tsup` (uses tsup.config.ts with shebang)

**CLI tsup.config.ts:**
```ts
entry: ['src/main.ts']
format: ['esm']
banner: { js: '#!/usr/bin/env node' }
```

---

### 5. Key Path Utilities

**Constants (transcript/discover.ts):**
- `CLIENT_PATTERNS` - Glob patterns per client:
  - codex: `sessions/**/*.jsonl`
  - claude: `projects/**/*.jsonl`
  - gemini: `tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.{json,jsonl}`, `history/**/*.{json,jsonl}`, `chats/**/*.{json,jsonl}`

**Default directories:**
- Global root: `~/.memorytree/transcripts`
- Codex root: `~/.codex`
- Claude root: `~/.claude`
- Gemini root: `~/.gemini`

**Import paths within repository:**
- Repo transcripts: `Memory/06_transcripts/{raw|clean|manifests}/{client}/{year}/{month}/`
- Global transcripts: `~/.memorytree/transcripts/{raw|clean}/{client}/{project}/{year}/{month}/`
- Global index: `~/.memorytree/transcripts/index/{manifests|sessions.jsonl|search.sqlite}`

---

### 6. Common Utilities Exported from @openmnemo/core

From `transcript/common.ts`:
- **Constants:** CLIENTS, TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES, SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES, TOOL_USE_TYPES, TOOL_RESULT_TYPES
- **Text processing:** slugify, contentHash, normalizeTimestamp, earliestTimestamp, parseIsoTimestamp, timestampPartition, joinParagraphs, summarizeValue, truncate, yamlEscape
- **Data access:** ensureDict, ensureList, getNested, loadJsonl, loadJson
- **Text extraction:** extractTextBlocks, extractSimpleText, extractGeminiText, extractGeminiParts, findFirstMappingWithKeys
- **Deduplication:** deduplicateMessages, deduplicateToolEvents
- **Hashing:** sha256File, contentHash

From `utils/path.ts`:
- **toPosixPath(p: string)** - Normalizes paths to POSIX format (forward slashes)

---

### 7. Development Configuration

**ESLint:** Flat config (eslint.config.mjs)
- TypeScript ESLint recommended preset
- Rule: unused vars must start with `_`
- Ignores: dist/, node_modules/, *.js, *.cjs

**Package Manager:** pnpm@9.15.0 (monorepo workspaces)

---

### 8. File Summary

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/package.json` | Root workspace config |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/pnpm-workspace.yaml` | pnpm monorepo definition |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/turbo.json` | Turbo build orchestration |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/eslint.config.mjs` | ESLint rules |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/types/src/index.ts` | Type definitions |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/index.ts` | Core exports |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/sync/src/config.ts` | Config management |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/sync/src/index.ts` | Sync module exports |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/cli/src/main.ts` | CLI entry point & commands |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/cli/tsup.config.ts` | CLI build config |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/transcript/` | Parsing & import logic (6 files) |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/storage/` | Storage abstraction (3 files) |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/recall/` | Session recall (1 file) |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/utils/` | Path & exec utilities (2 files) |

Perfect! I have enough information now. Let me compile a comprehensive report.

## OpenMnemo Monorepo - Complete Architecture Overview

### 1. Root Package Structure

**Location:** `/d/demo1/openmnemo/`

**Root package.json** (`/d/demo1/openmnemo/package.json`):
- Private workspace with pnpm@9.15.0
- Turbo-based monorepo (v2.4.0)
- Node.js >=20 required
- Scripts: `build`, `test`, `lint`, `typecheck` (all delegated to Turbo)

**pnpm-workspace.yaml:**
- Single glob: `packages/*` (all packages are direct children of packages/)

**turbo.json configuration:**
- `build` task: depends on `^build` (upstream), outputs to `dist/**`
- `test` task: depends on `build`
- `lint` task: no dependencies
- `typecheck` task: depends on `^build`

---

### 2. Package Structure

#### **@openmnemo/types** (`packages/types/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/index.js` | **Types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
**Build:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`

**Exported Types:**
- `type Client = 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini'`
- `interface TranscriptMessage { role: string; text: string; timestamp: string | null }`
- `interface TranscriptToolEvent { summary: string; timestamp: string | null }`
- `interface ParsedTranscript { client: Client; session_id: string; title: string; started_at: string; cwd: string; branch: string; messages: TranscriptMessage[]; tool_events: TranscriptToolEvent[]; source_path: string }`
- `interface ManifestEntry { client: string; project: string; session_id: string; raw_sha256: string; title: string; started_at: string; imported_at: string; cwd: string; branch: string; raw_source_path: string; raw_upload_permission: string; global_raw_path: string; global_clean_path: string; global_manifest_path: string; repo_raw_path: string; repo_clean_path: string; repo_manifest_path: string; message_count: number; tool_event_count: number; cleaning_mode: string; repo_mirror_enabled: boolean }`

---

#### **@openmnemo/core** (`packages/core/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/index.js` | **Types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
**Build:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
**Dependencies:** `@openmnemo/types`, `fast-glob@3.3.3`, `sql.js@1.12.0`

**Source Structure:**
- `src/transcript/` - Parsing, import, discovery, database
  - `common.ts` - Constants (CLIENTS, TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES, SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES, TOOL_USE_TYPES, TOOL_RESULT_TYPES), utilities (slugify, sha256File, contentHash, timestamp handling, text extraction, deduplication)
  - `parse.ts` - `inferClient()`, `parseTranscript()`, `parseCodexTranscript()`, `parseClaudeTranscript()`, `parseGeminiTranscript()`
  - `discover.ts` - File discovery with glob patterns per client
    - `defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()`, `defaultClientRoots()`, `discoverSourceFiles()`, `inferProjectSlug()`, `transcriptMatchesRepo()`, `projectSlugsMatch()`, `safeFileMtime()`
  - `import.ts` - Orchestration logic
    - `importTranscript()`, `transcriptHasContent()`, `writeCleanMarkdown()`, `preserveExistingImportTimestamp()`, `manifestSignature()`, `manifestChanged()`, `writeJson()`, `appendJsonl()`, `copyFile()`
  - `db.ts` - SQLite search index using sql.js
    - `upsertSearchIndex()`, `searchTranscripts()`
    - PK: client, project, session_id, raw_sha256
    - Data columns: title, started_at, imported_at, cwd, branch, raw_source_path, raw_upload_permission, global_raw_path, global_clean_path, repo_raw_path, repo_clean_path, repo_manifest_path, message_count, tool_event_count

- `src/recall/` - Session recall and sync
  - `recall.ts` - `recall()`, `syncCurrentProject()`, `findLatestSession()`, `findLatestFromJsonl()`, `cwdMatches()`, `formatRecallText()`
  - Exports `RecallResult` interface

- `src/storage/` - Storage abstraction
  - `adapter.ts` - `StorageAdapter` interface (async): `writeFile()`, `readFile()`, `exists()`, `mkdir()`, `copyFile()`, `appendFile()`
  - `local-adapter.ts` - `LocalAdapter` implementation using Node.js fs
  - `gitea-adapter.ts` - `GiteaAdapter` with options

- `src/utils/`
  - `path.ts` - `toPosixPath()` - converts Windows paths to POSIX format
  - `exec.ts` - `execCommand()`, `git()` helper functions

---

#### **@openmnemo/sync** (`packages/sync/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/index.js` | **Types:** `dist/index.d.ts`
**Build:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
**Dependencies:** `@openmnemo/core`, `@openmnemo/types`, `smol-toml@1.3.1`

**Source Files:**
- `src/config.ts` - Config loading/saving
  - `interface ProjectEntry { readonly path: string; readonly name: string }`
  - `interface Config { readonly heartbeat_interval: string; readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]; readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]; readonly auto_push: boolean; readonly log_level: string }`
  - Functions: `loadConfig()`, `saveConfig()`, `memorytreeRoot()`, `configPath()`, `intervalToSeconds()`, `registerProject()`
  - Loads from `~/.memorytree/config.toml` with smol-toml parser

- `src/heartbeat.ts` - Background sync daemon
  - `main()`, `runHeartbeat()`, `processProject()`, `scanSensitive()`, `gitCommitAndPush()`, `tryPush()`

- `src/lock.ts` - Process locking
  - `lockPath()`, `acquireLock()`, `releaseLock()`, `readLockPid()`, `isProcessAlive()`

- `src/alert.ts` - Alert system
  - Constants: `MAX_ALERTS`, `ALERT_TYPES`, `FAILURE_THRESHOLD`
  - Functions: `alertsPath()`, `readAlerts()`, `writeAlert()`, `writeAlertWithThreshold()`, `resetFailureCount()`, `clearAlerts()`, `formatAlertsForDisplay()`
  - `type Alert` exported

- `src/log.ts` - Logging
  - `setupLogging()`, `getLogger()`, `_resetLogger()`
  - `type LogLevel`, `type Logger` exported

---

#### **@openmnemo/cli** (`packages/cli/`)
**Entry point:** `dist/main.js` (binary: `openmnemo`)
**Build:** `tsup` (uses tsup.config.ts)
**Dependencies:** `@openmnemo/core`, `@openmnemo/sync`, `@openmnemo/types`, `commander@13.1.0`

**CLI Commands** (from `src/main.ts`):

1. **`init`** - Initialize a MemoryTree workspace
   - Options: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--goal-summary`, `--locale`, `--date`, `--time`, `--force`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-init.ts` â†’ `cmdInit()`

2. **`upgrade`** - Upgrade repo to MemoryTree format
   - Options: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--goal-summary`, `--locale`, `--date`, `--time`, `--format` (text|json)
   - Handler: `src/cmd-upgrade.ts` â†’ `cmdUpgrade()`

3. **`import`** - Import one transcript file
   - Options: `--source` (required), `--root`, `--client` (auto|codex|claude|gemini), `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--raw-upload-permission` (not-set|approved|denied), `--format` (text|json)
   - Handler: `src/cmd-import.ts` â†’ `cmdImport()`

4. **`discover`** - Discover and import local AI transcripts
   - Options: `--root`, `--client` (all|codex|claude|gemini), `--scope` (current-project|all-projects), `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--raw-upload-permission`, `--limit`, `--format`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-discover.ts` â†’ `cmdDiscover()`

5. **`locale`** - Detect effective locale
   - Options: `--root`, `--locale`, `--format`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-locale.ts` â†’ `cmdLocale()`

6. **`recall`** - On-demand sync and latest session recall
   - Options: `--root`, `--project-name`, `--global-root`, `--activation-time`, `--format`
   - Handler: `src/cmd-recall.ts` â†’ `cmdRecall()`

7. **`daemon`** - Heartbeat lifecycle management
   - Subcommands:
     - `install` - Register with OS scheduler (options: `--interval`, `--auto-push`)
     - `uninstall` - Remove scheduled task
     - `run-once` - Execute single heartbeat cycle
     - `watch` - Continuous loop (dev mode, option: `--interval`)
     - `status` - Show heartbeat and lock state
   - Handler: `src/cmd-daemon.ts`

**Project utilities** (`src/project/`):
- `scaffold.ts` - `buildDatetime()`, `createMemoryDirs()`, `findExternalPolicySources()`, `resolveScaffoldPaths()`, `resolveTemplateDir()`, `scaffoldContentFiles()`, `writeTemplate()`
- `locale.ts` - Locale detection
- `upgrade.ts` - Upgrade logic

---

### 3. TypeScript Configuration

**All packages use consistent tsconfig.json:**
- **Target:** ES2022
- **Module:** NodeNext (ESM with `.js` extensions required)
- **Root directory:** `src/`
- **Output directory:** `dist/`
- **Strict mode:** true
- **Source maps:** true
- **ESM interop:** true
- **Skip lib check:** true

**Notable difference (cli vs core/sync/types):**
- `packages/cli/tsconfig.json` has `"declaration": false` (CLI, no types exported)
- `packages/core`, `packages/sync`, `packages/types` have `"declaration": true`

---

### 4. Build System

**Root build script:** `turbo build`
- Depends on topological order

**Per-package build scripts:**
- **types & core:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
- **sync:** `tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts`
- **cli:** `tsup` (uses tsup.config.ts with shebang)

**CLI tsup.config.ts:**
```ts
entry: ['src/main.ts']
format: ['esm']
banner: { js: '#!/usr/bin/env node' }
```

---

### 5. Key Path Utilities

**Constants (transcript/discover.ts):**
- `CLIENT_PATTERNS` - Glob patterns per client:
  - codex: `sessions/**/*.jsonl`
  - claude: `projects/**/*.jsonl`
  - gemini: `tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.{json,jsonl}`, `history/**/*.{json,jsonl}`, `chats/**/*.{json,jsonl}`

**Default directories:**
- Global root: `~/.memorytree/transcripts`
- Codex root: `~/.codex`
- Claude root: `~/.claude`
- Gemini root: `~/.gemini`

**Import paths within repository:**
- Repo transcripts: `Memory/06_transcripts/{raw|clean|manifests}/{client}/{year}/{month}/`
- Global transcripts: `~/.memorytree/transcripts/{raw|clean}/{client}/{project}/{year}/{month}/`
- Global index: `~/.memorytree/transcripts/index/{manifests|sessions.jsonl|search.sqlite}`

---

### 6. Common Utilities Exported from @openmnemo/core

From `transcript/common.ts`:
- **Constants:** CLIENTS, TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES, SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES, TOOL_USE_TYPES, TOOL_RESULT_TYPES
- **Text processing:** slugify, contentHash, normalizeTimestamp, earliestTimestamp, parseIsoTimestamp, timestampPartition, joinParagraphs, summarizeValue, truncate, yamlEscape
- **Data access:** ensureDict, ensureList, getNested, loadJsonl, loadJson
- **Text extraction:** extractTextBlocks, extractSimpleText, extractGeminiText, extractGeminiParts, findFirstMappingWithKeys
- **Deduplication:** deduplicateMessages, deduplicateToolEvents
- **Hashing:** sha256File, contentHash

From `utils/path.ts`:
- **toPosixPath(p: string)** - Normalizes paths to POSIX format (forward slashes)

---

### 7. Development Configuration

**ESLint:** Flat config (eslint.config.mjs)
- TypeScript ESLint recommended preset
- Rule: unused vars must start with `_`
- Ignores: dist/, node_modules/, *.js, *.cjs

**Package Manager:** pnpm@9.15.0 (monorepo workspaces)

---

### 8. File Summary

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/package.json` | Root workspace config |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/pnpm-workspace.yaml` | pnpm monorepo definition |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/turbo.json` | Turbo build orchestration |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/eslint.config.mjs` | ESLint rules |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/types/src/index.ts` | Type definitions |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/index.ts` | Core exports |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/sync/src/config.ts` | Config management |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/sync/src/index.ts` | Sync module exports |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/cli/src/main.ts` | CLI entry point & commands |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/cli/tsup.config.ts` | CLI build config |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/transcript/` | Parsing & import logic (6 files) |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/storage/` | Storage abstraction (3 files) |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/recall/` | Session recall (1 file) |
| `/d/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core/src/utils/` | Path & exec utilities (2 files) |
